title: Heart Effects
description: This mod changes the texture of hearts depending on the effect!
body:
![Heart Effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/014e2ea30ceb88797c5ba765a30dcf76eb03b248.png)

# ❓ **What does this mod do?**
This mod changes the texture of hearts depending on the effect to make gameplay more diverse.

<hr />

# ❗ **Dependencies:**
- Owo Lib.

<hr />

# 🛑 **How to Report Issues**
Please, use the [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/Doublea06/HeartEffects/issues) to report bugs. Please, describe your problem in detail: What were you doing when problem occurred, which mods do you have, etc.

<hr />

# 💬 **Why did you make this mod?**
While I was playing minecraft, I saw that vanilla hearts looks a lit boring. So, i made this mod to diversify gameplay!

<hr />

# 💗**Some Hearts**
Absorption Effect:
![Absorption](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68c9ef3dfb0bd0caf38a131315bf0861b850bbf4.png)
